author: jfsicilia
description: Adds missing features to the file explorer.

manifest.author: Juan Sicilia
manifest.description: Adds missing features to the file explorer.
manifest.name: File Manager

name: File Manager

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Version 1.4.0

New commands:
    - Move active note to a new folder.
    - Go to folder in file explorer.

pathexplorer:
    - New `absolute-path` flag to show or not folders as absolute paths.
    - Use of `environment variables` in paths (linux/mac format `$<var>` or windows format `%<var>%`).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: An app URL scheme can now be defined as a command for "Open With...". For example, you can specify `ulysses://x-callback-url/open?path={{file_path}}` as a command. Template variables such as `file_path`, `folder_path`, `file_name` and `folder_name` can be used in the URL scheme. If the command is a URL scheme, arguments will be ignored.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix: Changed all colors to use Obsidian CSS variables (now colors work for light and dark mode).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: `pathexplorer` codeblock allows to display in a note the contents of one or more paths with several ways to customize it.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Made minor changes to comply with Obsidian policies.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Removed all uses of innerHTML for security reasons.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This new version provides the following new features:

Go to file/folder in file explorer command.
Custom Open file/folder with ... commands and context menu.
Better support for selected files and clipboard.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: When overwriting a file, now it uses the method app.fileManager.trashFile, to delete the file using user preferences.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: First release of File Manager Plugin.
